content: What does the Origin of Time do? It asks me to select one awakener or wheel of destiny, what will happen to the awakener/wheel I select?
thread_title: What does the "Origin of Time" pyramid do?

content: +pyramid
thread_title: What does the "Origin of Time" pyramid do?

content:
This item is called **Origin Of Time**, it provides two main benefits:

**Full Refund**: Recovers all XP and materials you invested in the character you use it on.

**Duplicate Conversion**: Only for Standard Awakeners (not for Limited in the Standard pool or the starting SR Awakeners), converts all additional copies into Standard "selectors," which can subsequently be used to obtain or duplicate other Standard Awakeners of your choice (not Limited in Standard).

This process is also applicable to **Standard Wheels** (except the Limited in the Standard pool).

It is primarily obtained from the developers through special in-game mail during specific events, such as anniversaries or major updates. It is used for re-allocating resources to build a better team.
thread_title: What does the "Origin of Time" pyramid do?

content: +12 kath when you dont even know what team she runs is crazy <:karen_Feelguilty:1468258923009282140>
kath is normally run in ultra, the meta team is kath, clementine, horla, and then tinct or ryker
u can swap in karen, erica, gramona, etc
heres an example team i ran this dtide
i advise u pull things that are not kath from now on, u need to broaden your account
mouchette can be run in mono chaos, caro, or ultra, but you have 0 of her good supports other than ramona and aigis
her best team is mouchette thais aigis helot
or mouchette arachne horla
you can also run tawil gmurphy, this is probably one of the better teams you can make, but both your tawil and gmurphy are e3 so they have not unlocked their carry potential
before that they are at best supports with decent damage
u can clear story with it but it will struggle at high difficulty anything
Ok so I assume I should pull horla? Like wait for her banner right? And for pure cores that means I should summon tinct?
And should I summon in any of the current banners like arachne and gdoll?
for pure cores u should try to get everyone
having all the standard units means u dont have this problem
as to current banners, i have 2 tier lists in my guide
higher = i think it is better for new players to pull

So, I have been playing Morimens for a week or so and I have found it rather easy to play with Arachne by pairing her up with Jenkin.

But I wanted help to build up some other team compositions that can help in different situations.

Also because I want to utilize other awakeners that I either have upgraded blindly, or haven't touched at all.

content: you have a vortice, who you can build a team around
and thats kind of it
you lack enlightens on gdoll or kath to make them usable carries
tulu is a support, he doesnt do anything on his own
you can maybe put together something with your e0 sorel, or your e0 faros, or maybe you can scrape together something with sanga or caecus or agrippa that will clear
but realistically u only have 2 teams right now, arachne plus jenkin or daffodil, and vortice plus tanks
you dont even have like an e3 alva or an e3 lotan or something that thais could turn into a real dps
you can build 5 teams that will clear alert 1 of dtide but they will be just stat checking, not actually good teams
this technically clears alert 1 for example
but in no way is it viable at endgame

So, I have only two "teams" that I can use untill I get enough dupes or other awakeners / wods that actually make a competent team.
That's to be expected 😅.
Anyway, thanks a lot, and thanks for the handbook; I'll give it a read.
